title: F1 Timing Message
description: Pub/Sub message for f1-timing topic — one record per driver per lap.

race_id.description: Unique race identifier, e.g. 2026_Australian Grand Prix.

total_laps.description: Total number of laps in this race.

timestamp_ms.description: UTC epoch milliseconds when this timing sample was produced.

driver_id.description: Three-letter driver abbreviation, e.g. VER, HAM.

lap_time_ms.description: Lap time in milliseconds. Null on first lap or missing.

gap_to_leader_ms.description: Time gap to P1 in milliseconds. Null for P1.

interval_ms.description: Time gap to car ahead in milliseconds. Null for P1.

pit_in_lap.description: True if this driver pitted at the end of this lap.

pit_out_lap.description: True if this driver emerged from pits at the start of this lap.
